metadata.description: A community marketplace of Claude plugins. Install from here to add skills, agents, and automations to Claude.

plugins.name: career-hunter
plugins.description: End-to-end job search automation: guided onboarding builds your personal application profile and a multi-tab Google Sheets tracker, then auto-apply and Gmail-sync skills hunt roles, submit applications, keep the tracker current, and add confirmed interviews to your Google Calendar.

plugins.name: x-twitter-scraper
plugins.description: Plan Xquik X/Twitter data workflows with REST API routing, MCP setup, SDKs, webhooks, exports, monitoring, and confirmation-gated actions.
